ai_result.title: Bmore Peninsula: Paddle to Nick's Fish House
ai_result.summary: Join Colleen for an intermediate-level paddle to Nick's Fish House for brunch.

ai_result.title: Solley's Cove: Ghost Ships and Brunch
ai_result.summary: Join Lisa for a 5-mile paddle to see ghost ships and enjoy brunch at Ramshead Dockside.

ai_result.title: Fells Point: Kayak availability may be limited
ai_result.summary: New-member orientation will use club kayaks.

ai_result.title: Delta: Explore the Conowingo Islands & Muddy Creek
ai_result.summary: Join an exploratory paddle with Ricardo S. covering 5-8 miles.

ai_result.title: Dundalk: Paddle around Dundalk
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a laid-back two-hour paddle at a beginner-friendly slow-moderate pace.

ai_result.title: Delta, PA: Rescue Training
ai_result.summary: Attendees will learn and practice rescue skills such as wet exit, partner rescue, self-rescue, and emptying a kayak.

ai_result.title: Havre de Grace: Paddle to the Lighthouse and the Bay
ai_result.summary: Join Michelle for a paddle to the Lighthouse and the Bay in Havre de Grace.
